text: Index: www/en/platforms/amd64/motherboards.sgml =================================================================== RCS file: /usr/cvs/www/en/platforms/amd64/motherboards.sgml,v retrieving revision 1.141 diff -u -r1.141 motherboards.sgml --- www/en/platforms/amd64/motherboards.sgml 13 Jun 2008 09:05:43 -0000 1.141 +++ www/en/platforms/amd64/motherboards.sgml 17 Jun 2008 20:09:24 -0000 @@ -632,6 +632,16 @@ Gigabyte + GA-P35-DS3L + Intel P35 / Socket 775 + Ben Kaduk + (dmesg, pciconf) + 7.0-STABLE (May 2008) + Tested with 4Gb RAM and Intel Q6600 Core 2 quad core CPU. + SATA/PATA and onboard network card work well, sound untested. + + + Gigabyte GA-P35-DS4 Intel P35 / Socket 775 Torsten Hantzsche
